commitMove(address,uint256,bytes32).notice: Both gods submit their move hash. commit = keccak256(abi.encode(move, secret))

forfeitExpired(uint256).notice: Forfeit an expired match (called by anyone after deadline)

proposeChallenge(address,address,uint256.notice: God proposes a challenge to another god. Deducts stake from treasury.

revealMove(address,uint256,uint8,bytes32.notice: Both gods reveal their move. Resolves the match.
